message:
fix(pipeline): use OsString-based path construction for backup paths

Replace string-formatting on the full path (format!("{base}.bak"))
with proper OsString manipulation via file_name() + push() +
with_file_name(). The previous approach converted the entire path to
a lossy string and appended the .bak suffix, which could produce
incorrect results for paths containing non-UTF-8 bytes or unusual
characters. The new approach operates on OsString components and uses
Path::with_file_name() to reconstruct the path, which is both more
correct and idiomatic for Rust path handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
